---
title: "ConSciR Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---



##### Dew Point check
 
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

mydata <- 
  expand.grid(Temp, RH) |> 
  tibble() |> 
  rename(Temp = Var1, RH = Var2)

mydata <- 
  mydata |> 
  mutate(
    Abs = calcAH(Temp, RH), 
    DP = calcDP(Temp, RH), 
    DewPoint = calcDewPoint(Temp, RH), 
    MR = calcMR(Temp, RH), 
    Enthalpy = calcEnthalpy(Temp, RH), 
    Pws = calcPws(Temp), 
    Pw = calcPw(Temp, RH))

mydata <- mydata |> mutate(DPdiff = DP - DewPoint)

mydata |>
  mutate(DPdiff_log = log(DPdiff)) |>
  ggplot(aes(Temp, RH, z = DPdiff_log)) +
  geom_contour_filled() + 
  geom_contour(col = "white", bins = 10) +
  labs(title = "Dew Point calculation differences NOAA vs Dario", subtitle = "Log scale") + 
  theme_bw()
  
```
